news.t: Actively Navigate Shifting Growth in EM With FFEM

holdings.infoBox: FFEM is an equity ETF with a total of 117 individual holdings. The top holdings are Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company stock at 16.25%, Samsung Electronics at 10.81%, SK hynix at 7.49%, Tencent Holdings at 4.79%, and MediaTek at 2.50%.

overview.description: The Fidelity Fundamental Emerging Markets ETF (FFEM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund seeks to achieve long-term capital growth through an actively managed portfolio of emerging markets stocks selected based on fundamental factors. The fund includes issuers of any market capitalization. FFEM was launched on Nov 19, 2024 and is issued by Fidelity.

data.title: Actively Navigate Shifting Growth in EM With FFEM
data.text: Higher-for-longer interest rates and ongoing geopolitical friction make navigating emerging markets (EM) and capturing their growth potential a trying task. This is where investors can shift the onus ...
